commits.author: Morrow
lines: Snapping and connecting in the debug editor are no longer mutually exclusive.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed Astronomical templates to correctly allow inclinations between -pi and pi.
Changed custom angle clamping for argument of periapsis and longitude of ascending node to use our library functions.
Fixed RadianReference constructors to always call OnDataLoad().

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Additional tweaks to cloud upscaling to reduce trailing/judder
Fix flickering/disconuity artifacts appearing on clouds where horizon line and terrain discontinuities are
